title: pedilonum exilicaule
intro: Pedilonum exilicaule is a plant species that belongs to the family Pedaliaceae, commonly known as the Sesame flower. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pedilonum exilicaule include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
